# Project Overview: Frens MVP

**Generated By:** @business-analyst
**Last Updated:** 2026-03-05

---

## 1. Executive Summary

**Frens** is a song request and donation platform tailored specifically for streamers in the "just-chatting" and interactive livestreaming niche. The platform enables viewers to donate to streamers in exchange for song requests, creating a monetizable and engaging interaction layer for live content.

The **MVP phase** adopts a **Frontend-First Approach** — prioritizing UI/UX development to facilitate immediate user testing and validation before backend/database integration. The core differentiator is the **OBS overlay ecosystem**, making the platform compatible with any streaming service that uses OBS (Twitch, YouTube Live, Kick, TikTok Live, etc.).

---

## 2. Business Goals & KPIs

| Goal                                        | Metric/KPI                                        | Priority |
| :------------------------------------------ | :------------------------------------------------ | :------- |
| Validate product-market fit with streamers  | 10 streamers complete onboarding flow             | High     |
| Confirm user intent to use in production    | 80% of testers say they'd use it live             | High     |
| Test core donation flow engagement          | 5 mock donations processed per test session       | High     |
| Establish OBS overlay as key differentiator | All testers successfully embed at least 1 overlay | Medium   |

---

## 3. Target Audience / Personas

| Persona                                    | Needs                                                                                                                    | Pain Points                                                                                                  |
| :----------------------------------------- | :----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | :----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Streamer** (Just-Chatting / Interactive) | Monetization tools that feel native to livestreaming; easy OBS integration; real-time viewer engagement                  | Existing donation tools are generic; no seamless music request integration; overlays require technical setup |
| **Viewer** (Donor)                         | Frictionless way to support favorite streamers; interactive experience (song requests); personal connection via messages | Donating feels impersonal; no way to influence stream content directly; complex checkout flows               |

---

## 4. Key Non-Functional Requirements (NFR)

- **Performance:** UI must load instantly; YouTube search results < 2s; OBS overlays must render without frame drops
- **Security:** Email verification for streamers; mock payment data should simulate secure transactions (no real PII handling in MVP)
- **Availability:** Frontend static hosting (100% uptime target); YouTube API quota management
- **Compatibility:** OBS overlay widgets must work across all major streaming platforms (Twitch, YouTube Live, Kick, TikTok Live)
- **Cost Constraint:** $0 infrastructure cost during MVP phase

---

## 5. Monetization & Business Constraints

### Monetization Model

1. **Platform Fee:** Small percentage fee charged to viewers on each donation transaction
2. **Withdrawal Fee:** Fee charged when streamers withdraw their accumulated donations

### Business Constraints

- **$0 Infrastructure Cost:** MVP must run entirely on free-tier services
- **Mock Payments:** No real payment gateway integration until post-validation
- **YouTube Music Only:** Music engine restricted to YouTube (music category filter via YouTube Data API v3)
- **No Authentication for Viewers:** Viewer experience must be completely frictionless (no login required)

---

## 6. Core Features (Hub → Spoke Mapping)

| #   | Feature Name              | Description                                                |
| :-- | :------------------------ | :--------------------------------------------------------- |
| 01  | Landing Page              | Value proposition page for streamers                       |
| 02  | Authentication            | Registration, email verification, login                    |
| 03  | Onboarding                | Profile setup flow after auth                              |
| 04  | Analytics Dashboard       | Donations, donors, visits, top songs, time-series charts   |
| 05  | OBS Overlays              | Alerts, Player/Queue, Leaderboard, Custom overlays         |
| 06  | Player & Queue Management | Music controls, queue management                           |
| 07  | Donation Settings         | Donation options, minimum amounts, queue sorting rules     |
| 08  | Viewer Public Profile     | Frictionless access, song search, selection, mock checkout |

---

## 7. Technical Constraints (MVP Phase)

| Constraint         | Detail                                                              |
| :----------------- | :------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Frontend Framework | TBD by @tech-lead                                                   |
| Music Engine       | YouTube Data API v3 (search) + YouTube IFrame Player API (playback) |
| Payment Gateway    | Mock implementation (no real transactions)                          |
| Hosting            | Free-tier static hosting (e.g., Vercel, Netlify)                    |
| Database           | None in MVP (mock data / local storage)                             |

---

## 9. Red Team Analysis

> **⚠️ Critical Issues Identified** — Red Team review completed on 2026-03-10

### Summary of Findings

| Phase                           | Confidence Score | Status                                  |
| ------------------------------- | ---------------- | --------------------------------------- |
| Phase 1: Business Context       | 45/100           | 🔴 Needs re-planning                    |
| Phase 2: Product Specs          | 55/100           | 🟠 Sync issue must be resolved          |
| Phase 3: Technical Architecture | 40/100           | 🔴 Significant re-architecture required |

### Critical Hard Blockers

1. **Unvalidated Market Assumption** — No evidence streamers want this product
2. **localStorage Cannot Support Real-Time Sync** — Core feature (OBS overlay sync) impossible with current architecture
3. **YouTube API Error Handling Missing** — No fallback strategy when API fails
4. **No Testing/CI-CD Strategy** — 108 tasks with no test plan

### Recommended Actions

1. Conduct 10 user interviews with streamers before building
2. Replace localStorage with BroadcastChannel API for MVP real-time sync
3. Reduce scope from 108 tasks to 40 tasks (validation-first approach)
4. Add YouTube API error handling and quota management

## 10. Next Steps

1. ⏳ **Address Red Team Hard Blockers** — Resolve critical issues before proceeding
2. ⏳ **Conduct User Validation** — Interview 10 streamers to validate market need
3. ⏳ **Pivot Architecture** — Replace localStorage with BroadcastChannel for real-time sync
4. ⏳ **Reduce Scope** — Focus on 40 tasks for validation-first MVP
